reference: If she really had an episode of unconsciousness, no matter how long it lasted, she would have had a computed tomography scan of the brain done. Fever and chills might not be associated with that but should be assessed properly by a physician.
text: If she really had an episode of unconsciousness, no matter how long it lasted, she would have had a computed tomography scan of the brain done. Fever and chills might not be associated with that, but should be assessed properly by a physician.
